name: tauri-workspace
contributors: Tauri Programme within The Commons Conservancy

scripts.build: pnpm run -F !api build && pnpm run -F api build
scripts.build:debug: pnpm run -F !api build:debug && pnpm run -F api build:debug

//pnpm-audit: The advisories acknowledged in pnpm.auditConfig.ignoreGhsas are all transitive dev/build/example/tooling dependencies of the upstream Tauri JS workspace (packages/api eslint + rollup tooling, examples/api vite/svelte/unocss, crates/tauri-schema-worker wrangler/miniflare). None ship in the BeyPilot CEF fork, which consumes only the Rust crates via [patch.crates-io]. They are acknowledged so `pnpm audit` passes in CI. To remediate fully (recommended when you can run pnpm): bump the parent dev tools (eslint, vite, svelte, unocss, wrangler, @rollup/plugin-terser) and regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml, then drop the corresponding entries here.
